司令官さま～～！ この壺、見てください～～！: Commander! Please look at this pot!
先ほど行商人さんから買った壺なんですけど、なんとこれ！<br>持っているだけで幸:
I just bought this pot from a traveling merchant, and guess what? It
makes you happy just by holding it!
少し高かったですけど、幸せが何よりですもんね♪<br>龍神さまもきっと喜んでくれ:
Although it was a little expensive, happiness is the most important
thing, isn't it?♪ I'm sure the Dragon God is also pleased!♪
――え？ 騙されてる……？ もぉ、司令官さまったら。こういうことは<br>信じる:
...Huh? Tricked...? Oh my, Commander. Having a believing heart is
important, you know? Right, Dragon God!
ええ！？ 龍神さまも『騙されている』って連呼してます～～！<br>そ、そんなぁ～:
Eeh! The Dragon God also keeps shouting, "You've been tricked"!
Th-that can't be! What should I do, Commander!
